name: Giant Double Chocolate Chip Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream together the shortening and brown sugar until well combined.
3. Add the egg, sour cream, and vanilla to the mixture. Mix until smooth.
4. Melt 1 1/2 cups of chocolate chips and blend into the creamed mixture.
5. In a separate bowl, mix the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
6. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the creamed mixture, stirring until just combined.
7. Fold in the chopped walnuts and the remaining chocolate chips.
8. Chill the dough for 30 minutes.
9. Using an ice cream scoop or a 1/4 cup measuring scoop, form balls of dough and place them on greased baking sheets.
10. Flatten each cookie slightly to about 3 inches in diameter.
11. Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until set but still slightly soft in the center.
12. This recipe yields approximately 16 giant cookies.
